summary: Contract for task-002 approved. Scope enumeration is exhaustive (20 actionable hits across 13 files with per-file line numbers). Heredoc vs here-string rules are correctly differentiated (single-line <<<, multiline <<EOF with single-quoted delimiter, fallback for apostrophes). Bash(...) wrapper and fenced-code indentation edge cases are explicitly handled. Non-JSON value flags (event log --data, context write --data, packet create --file/--content) are preserved in every step with matching grep whitelists in demo_steps. qa-engineer.md line 99 is correctly scoped as prose accuracy, not a command rewrite.
concerns: Step 11 redirection example `< <gate_result_json_file>` reads ambiguously; worker should ensure rendered markdown distinguishes the `<` operator from the `<placeholder>` token, or prefer heredoc form for the file-input case.
AC6 single-quoted heredoc guard (`<<EOF` grep) covers newly added heredocs only; worker should double-check no pre-existing unquoted heredoc in target files is mistakenly counted as new.
No structural blockers. Contract is safe to execute.
